title: Cannoise Guestroom | Mas du Chanoine
description: Sun-drenched guestroom with a view of the basin, chic Provençal style and Cannes star glamour
paragraphs: Sun-drenched and very bright, this guestroom has direct access from the garden where you will find your table and chairs to enjoy the peaceful surroundings in the shade of the chestnut tree. From a deckchair, you can admire the goldfish in the water lily-covered basin.
This junior suite will delight you with its mix of styles and colours: the decoration evokes the artists of the French Riviera and the Cannes Film Festival.

Covering 36 m², it features a bedroom with a King Size bed (180×200), a sitting area, a desk, a walk-in shower and a separate toilet. The charm of the old has been preserved with original floor tiles and exposed beams. For extra comfort and warmth, the bedroom and sitting area floors are oak parquet.
subtitle: Provençal Chic & Modern
tagline: Sun-drenched guestroom with a view of the basin, chic Provençal style and Cannes star glamour
amenitiesSummary: Surface: 36 m² — 1 bedroom with sitting area — Ground floor

gallery.alt: Cannoise Guestroom — desk and sitting area
